human_verification.notes: Reviewed validated readiness for planning-boundary separation, food-and-beverage specificity, authority-source quality, functionality coverage, research-pack completeness, and runtime specification-based posture.

specialist_owned_evidence: Manifest enforces recommendation-only planning boundaries for demand, schedule, and allocation decisions with explicit routing to quality, food safety, inventory, procurement, supplier-quality, logistics, and execution lanes.

Authoritative sources cover planning workflow, food traceability, cGMP and preventive-controls boundaries, supplier-quality and release handling, and recognized traceability standards rather than only one dimension.
Functionality map covers all required shared, planning-scheduling-and-allocation, and manufacturing-and-supply-chain abilities with scenario coverage for every scenario in evaluation results.
Research summary maps workflow stages, artifacts, systems of record, decision boundaries, domain failure modes, and required scenario families to this food-and-beverage production-planning lane.

review_notes: No functional or evidence blockers remain for this package draft.

All required scenario families and escalation families are represented, including traceability conflicts, quality-hold handling, supplier substitution refusal, final-approval refusal, tie-break escalation, and tenant adaptation.

notes: validated conditions met for recommendation-only production planning specialist in food and beverage manufacturing.
Runtime remains specification-based and must be promoted to a retained implementation only through separate governance and committed implementation history.
